CREATE TABLE aggregate_test (UserID UInt64, RegionID UInt32, SendTiming UInt64) ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY UserID;
INSERT INTO aggregate_test SELECT uniqState(UserID), RegionID, quantilesState(0.5, 0.9)(SendTiming) FROM (SELECT UserID, RegionID, SendTiming FROM source_table) GROUP BY RegionID;
CREATE TABLE source_table (UserID UInt64, RegionID UInt32, SendTiming UInt64);
SELECT uniqMerge(state) FROM (SELECT uniqState(UserID) AS state FROM aggregate_test GROUP BY RegionID);
SELECT uniq(UserID), quantilesMerge(quantilesState(0.5, 0.9)(SendTiming)) FROM aggregate_test GROUP BY RegionID;

CREATE TABLE aggregate_results AS SELECT RegionID, uniqMerge(state) AS unique_users, quantilesMerge(quantilesState(0.5, 0.9)(SendTiming)) AS timing_quantiles FROM (SELECT RegionID, uniqState(UserID) AS state, quantilesState(0.5, 0.9)(SendTiming) FROM aggregate_test GROUP BY RegionID);

WITH (SELECT uniqState(UserID) FROM aggregate_test WHERE RegionID = 1) AS state1, (SELECT quantilesState(0.5, 0.9)(SendTiming) FROM aggregate_test WHERE RegionID = 1) AS state2 SELECT uniqMerge(state1) AS unique_users, quantilesMerge(state2) AS timing_quantiles;

INSERT INTO aggregate_test SELECT uniqState(UserID), RegionID, quantilesState(0.5, 0.9)(SendTiming) FROM (SELECT * FROM source_table WHERE UserID IN (SELECT UserID FROM aggregate_test WHERE RegionID = 1)) GROUP BY RegionID;
SELECT sum(uniqMerge(state)) FROM (SELECT uniqState(UserID) AS state FROM aggregate_test GROUP BY RegionID) WHERE RegionID = 2;
